activities.title: Study Worked Example: Understanding Inflation and CPI
mapped_learning_outcomes: Understand the concept of inflation and how it affects the overall economy.
Explain the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and its role in measuring inflation.

required_materials.purpose: Demonstrate calculation and interpretation of inflation using CPI data
required_materials.specification: Step-by-step calculation of inflation rate from CPI values over two years with explanations

required_materials.purpose: Show completed example of inflation calculation and economic impact summary
required_materials.specification: Completed inflation calculation with commentary on economic implications

required_materials.purpose: Explanatory teaching on inflation and CPI concepts
required_materials.specification: Clear exposition on what inflation is, how CPI is constructed, and why it matters

activities.learner_task:
## Study the worked example and sample output carefully.

- Understand how inflation is calculated using CPI data.
- Note the economic implications explained in the sample output.

Then, answer the following:

1. Define inflation in your own words.
2. Explain the role of CPI in measuring inflation.
activities.expected_output: Written definitions and explanations demonstrating understanding of inflation and CPI, referencing the worked example and sample output.
activities.activity_preamble: This activity introduces the fundamental concepts of inflation and the Consumer Price Index (CPI). You will study a detailed worked example and a sample output to build a solid foundation before applying these concepts.
activities.support_note: Focus on the relationship between CPI changes and inflation rates to avoid confusing nominal price changes with inflation.
activities.prior_knowledge_activation: Recall any previous knowledge about price changes or economic indicators you have encountered.

activities.title: Practice: Analyze Inflation Impact on Household Purchasing Power
mapped_learning_outcomes: Analyze the impact of inflation on household purchasing power and living costs.

required_materials.purpose: Provide scenarios of households facing different inflation rates and living cost changes
required_materials.specification: Multiple household scenarios with income, expenditure, and inflation data

required_materials.purpose: Guide analysis of inflation impact on purchasing power
required_materials.specification: Checklist of factors to consider such as income changes, price increases, and cost of living

activities.learner_task:
## For each household scenario:

- Use the provided data to analyze how inflation affects their purchasing power.
- Identify which expenses are most impacted by inflation.
- Complete the checklist to ensure thorough analysis.

Summarize your findings for each scenario.
activities.expected_output: Completed analysis notes and checklist for each scenario, with clear identification of inflation impacts on household purchasing power and living costs.
activities.activity_preamble: This activity helps you apply your understanding of inflation to real-life household scenarios. You will analyze how inflation changes affect different aspects of household finances.
activities.support_note: Consider both income and expenditure changes when analyzing purchasing power to avoid partial conclusions.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Focus on cause-effect relationships between inflation and household economic conditions.

activities.title: Evaluate Strategies to Manage Inflation Effects on Household Finances
mapped_learning_outcomes: Evaluate strategies households can use to manage the effects of inflation on their finances.

required_materials.purpose: Provide prompts to guide evaluation of different financial strategies
required_materials.specification: Questions and criteria for assessing effectiveness, feasibility, and risks of strategies

required_materials.purpose: Think-aloud expert reasoning on selecting and evaluating inflation management strategies
required_materials.specification: Expert commentary on decision criteria and trade-offs

activities.learner_task:
## Review the modelling note on managing inflation effects.

- Use the prompt set to evaluate at least three different strategies households might use.
- Consider pros, cons, and suitability for different household types.

Write a short evaluation report summarizing your judgments.
activities.expected_output: A written evaluation report that critically assesses multiple strategies with justifications based on the provided prompts and modelling note.
activities.activity_preamble: This activity develops your ability to critically evaluate financial strategies to mitigate inflation impacts using expert reasoning and guided prompts.
activities.support_note: Avoid one-size-fits-all conclusions; consider household diversity and context in your evaluation.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Apply critical thinking and decision-making criteria to assess strategy effectiveness.

activities.title: Consolidation: Summarize and Reflect on Inflation and Household Finance
mapped_learning_outcomes: Understand the concept of inflation and how it affects the overall economy.
Explain the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and its role in measuring inflation.
Analyze the impact of inflation on household purchasing power and living costs.
Evaluate strategies households can use to manage the effects of inflation on their finances.

required_materials.purpose: Guide learner to produce a session closure summary and reflection
required_materials.specification: Template requiring ≥80 words summarizing ≥3 key ideas learned, with reflection prompts
Questions encouraging learner to connect concepts and personal context

activities.learner_task:
## Write a consolidation summary of this session.

- Summarize at least three key ideas you have learned about inflation and its effects.
- Reflect on how this knowledge might affect your personal or household financial decisions.

Use the provided template and reflection prompts to guide your writing.
activities.expected_output: A written consolidation summary of at least 80 words covering key session ideas and personal reflection on inflation and household finance.
activities.activity_preamble: This final activity helps you consolidate your learning by summarizing key concepts and reflecting on their relevance to your own financial context.
activities.support_note: Ensure your summary captures both conceptual understanding and personal application insights.
activities.self_explanation_prompt: How do the concepts of inflation and CPI influence your view of household financial planning?
activities.transfer_or_application_task: Consider your own or a hypothetical household’s situation when reflecting.

A1: Understand the concept of inflation and how it affects the overall economy.
Explain the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and its role in measuring inflation.
A2: Analyze the impact of inflation on household purchasing power and living costs.
A3: Evaluate strategies households can use to manage the effects of inflation on their finances.
A4: Understand the concept of inflation and how it affects the overall economy.
Explain the Consumer Price Index (CPI) and its role in measuring inflation.
Analyze the impact of inflation on household purchasing power and living costs.
Evaluate strategies households can use to manage the effects of inflation on their finances.

delivery_notes.consolidation_requirement: The final activity includes a consolidation summary requiring the learner to write at least 80 words summarizing three key ideas and reflecting on their personal context.
